nasb.text: The Chaldeans who are fighting against this city will enter and set this city on fire and burn it, with the houses where people have offered incense to Baal on their roofs and poured out drink offerings to other gods to provoke Me to anger.

esv.text: The Chaldeans who are fighting against this city shall come and set this city on fire and burn it, with the houses on whose roofs offerings have been made to Baal and drink offerings have been poured out to other gods, to provoke me to anger.

cnv.text: 攻打這城的迦勒底人必進來，放火燒城，城中的房屋都必燒光，因為這城的居民曾在那些房屋的屋頂上向巴力燒香，向別神澆奠祭，惹我發怒。

ccb.text: 他们必放火焚城，把城中的房屋付之一炬，城中的居民曾在房顶上向巴力烧香、向假神奠酒，惹我发怒。
